sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23699" key="deimato/eis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δειμᾰτ-όεις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εσσα</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εν</itype>, <sense id="n23699.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">frightened, scared,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.244</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollonid.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
